subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Today the most momentous of all tasks is the teaching of God's Cause and the diffusion of His divine fragrances through books and epistles [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان الیوم اعظم امور تبلیغ امرالله است و نشر نفحات الله کتب و رسائل
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @methods of teaching the Cause, @words vs deeds, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause
